textByHash.005164aaa182a08342392d89faa06e6ade5e74a7: Who knows what you'd get up to down here on your own.
textByHash.03e430804d1f211d91d18205b039cf6ee1bfa24f: Oh? A surprise? It's not something horrible I hope.
textByHash.067192bbd36b528fce3df52b8d19d463089a9b8f: I'm surprised I hadn't heard about your prowess before.
textByHash.069e347f8b62295ea851ca58e7d20de75a0c7177: Oh dear. You didn't hand out any eggs at all! Do you want to try again?
textByHash.096af2fd13c86cf811aacd628243aedb1db86789: You call me the Easter Bunny? What right do I have to that name?
textByHash.10c8c03b334b9e0cfbf2c00d4d3a35e890edd90e: The most eggceptional milk around has got to be milk from Hosidius, I'm sure Duke Horacio's cook in Lumbridge castle can help you out.
textByHash.148835f241c829e9c9b338cb8e87baca8a122eae: Many times have I walked past Varrock West Bank and been called 'Sellin lobbies 200gp'.
textByHash.177c6470cc9dddeefb8c78f2f66562a88e8dc60a: But we should do this again.
textByHash.1811ead638d7d69c3dc06a48bb11bee51a23c4ae: I'd suggest checking the Shantay Pass.
textByHash.1d780eb5c335a7ca7968b68731e6286b8e8fed1a: Hmm... I'm feeling a bit more hopeful. Like spring is about to, well, spring! But I'm not sure if Easter is really my thing any more.
textByHash.223574f65b729ac0b4adecbec60f8d8f99c9ab98: The second ingredient is really high quality milk.
textByHash.24019045c7a72901693dd374a86475a471bfbe84: If you lose it, you can get another one from Diango in Draynor.
textByHash.24280aa9fc5d3362648ade0bf069ff94c2d38c81: Special eh? Why would you give me something special?
textByHash.2566b298fab20cb0cb5aa0f9ded7a64ff7a70a9d: It's been so long since I've had a decent set with a worthy opponent.
textByHash.275bc42bb900471e249be60714a77715a591cb3b: Lawks! Look at the time, I should get back to Varrock to set up the Eggs!
textByHash.28a4bc0867a765052229a79d9669c1bba6aab518: Oh really? I don't keep track, so much to do around now.
textByHash.370ef8242f7fe0c927f7261bb9c69276dc26c5df: But if I'm spot on with my information, there should bea merchant making his way from the Kharidian Desert to Al Kharid.
textByHash.37155d668d9a310b7aea1d88892d32ab6dcd314a: But if I'm spot on with my information, there should be a merchant rolling into Al Kharid soon. He should sell you some.
textByHash.43accf8135d2fcf09a24c8f4c2df109326ae16f9: Thanks for eggreeing to help me.
textByHash.456ef0466e30e69776a1a38ace981dc71f87434e: I don't really understand that one.
textByHash.4b1e7a4ccb67e92eee4914b0f7398d9c8ead76ad: Not really, I've eaten a lot of carrots recently.
textByHash.4dc55e95420f3d5c56b13f49d0d2dc6becbe7171: Thank you! You handed out eggs! Here is your Easter reward!
textByHash.525fed01030e3e3a0768bfd6d2f744266a051fa5: And nobody here quite likes bowling.
textByHash.55c4e029c8f50535bbac2ffb6d279b055b2fd176: Thanks for saving our bacon and eggs again!
textByHash.57277d7c7fed7eaed1fa357b328d22abfa17d81f: But I'm afraid I've left things a bit late this year. I'm going to need some help to get all these eggs delivered! Would you help me?
textByHash.574e2c8fd675154e2547948c701334c7bf9d7bb6: Oh no, why today of all days?
textByHash.643f39bd9c17b822148fd78cda3cdc93d9bb3785: Thank you! You handed out eggs!
textByHash.65017dab89b0a09fecdce02bbd928f9d8a3642c5: You made it? Well in that case I suppose I might give it a try. As long as Wheeler hasn't been near it.
textByHash.661feffc02694ab75b98eab704c9132ccf5834e4: Easter Bunny... Now there's a name I haven't heard in a long time...
textByHash.66ca9858f198bad28b4f66228ab72ebd9d257e2d: Splendid, splendid! Here's a basket of eggs. Hand out as many as you can before they disappear and then come back to me. You've only got two minutes!
textByHash.676f22c6ed6a274d8df2d00c9d755b8146d2f6f5: The most eggceptional milk around has got to be milk from Hosidius, I'm sure Duke Horacio's cook can help you out.
textByHash.67e98d42699334c74290687cc677b0d949133fb0: Who could blame them? I'm a failure!
textByHash.6c98ef85a2474ed8fe041a72cbcbb3cb87dfdcad: Oh dear oh dear! I've got to hurry!
textByHash.6d54b2351050b5ffdcadc453c929b9198adcc954: Also, if you ever forget what you need, there will be a worker nearby who can remind you.
textByHash.6d9b477366af7587d4f916508084efda4b992d28: I feel like I need one more little treat before I do anything to help with Easter.
textByHash.6ec70768f295df723ebbb58d31a6bd4ffb6635fc: Precisely, so we'd all appreciate it if you didn't.
textByHash.70a46505e7f25e103de971ecabdcc5f30060b159: During any other time of year this ingredient would be a nightmare to get.
textByHash.713a7e351c91b7b0aa65989a99bbda2da4d5db9f: Oh, I'm starting to remember now! Easter is great! But I just... Hmm, I don't know...
textByHash.77efa8f8a7b2f85694a929d64801e48dd69e8840: Oh dear, you don't have any free inventory space. Talk to me again when you have.
textByHash.79d7ad56cd395146810f853c3b36c4afacca9db8: Try not to bring me camel dung, they do look similar.
textByHash.7a63ed49db56c30b140e0d985d12f8df89f82d47: I have something fun for you!
textByHash.7bff540b08f328a7ad5c91979b0fb68b3604a4a9: An Easter bun? I like those!
textByHash.7ea9623b786a7547a602a405e736fa73b4785036: Splendid, splendid! Here's a basket of eggs. Hand out as many as you can before they disappear and then come back to me for your reward. You've only got two minutes!
textByHash.816494efe5b27f588736cb90f9b47b65cf1e24e3: There are three ingredients that are needed to make the fuel.
textByHash.8655b5ce0c02711280296df5bc4c2f64ed555e0a: I feel less horrible I suppose...
textByHash.88d9a211372dd7e69a09a71fde8ce2828ac0c218: Maybe I'll make my way through this sorry old world as a clown...
textByHash.8d5ecabaf5321450d432561703cedcf859f7f78f: That dance was amazing! Well done. I feel so... Invigorated!
textByHash.918b18a2ca837adf65291e5dd0ce39065790eb0b: I should be off. Always a pleasure, Bowley.
textByHash.91d4a6502b7ec884b1bac53ed09ac0412a0a8695: I'm just a big dumb rabbit!
textByHash.93851cd5d0d88e6eeb68808aa25087ce81e9a512: The third ingredient is some cracking spices, very special ones. Can't go into detail, trade secret and all.
textByHash.9716aa7926b07f822033a667bbb4915fde33f90d: Since you're doing errands for me. Feel Free to use my tunnels to get around.
textByHash.9e2f100fbc977552c605e28951d9cd260d48539d: Would you please stop , I'ts very hard to rush back here so fast.
textByHash.9ef9d74cf1a60094a70eb79850c0ac54cdf8585b: I would love it if a cracking adventurer, such as yourself, would help a Bunny in need.
textByHash.a57fead3e588a767c986fad9cb346fb6b0cc9162: How could I ever lose my Easter spirit?
textByHash.aba8cce0a99e062f28d134c61c5aca8cb7e4c5b0: I just haven't had the spring in my step with my egg responsibilities.
textByHash.ac12a87773f07885670c6a9342ea94d86101076f: I don't feel the spirit of Easter within me.
textByHash.ac280157cf848f8ed5732b91189dcb32f00052a1: Oh it was fun but I think I'm just going to sit in the Rabbit Hole a bit longer.
textByHash.b865f99e2aca04849950f71e3f060186e743b42d: Come back when you have more space.
textByHash.bb59d96d37259e1af34d6cf325137157fd952875: Thanks for your help! You should have a break now. Come back in minutes if you want to hand out more eggs.
textByHash.bb7fb947ac77f85feb612b364ab4887ec7f3277e: I'm sure if you talk to Martin in Draynor, he'll be a good egg and help you out if you ask for Special spices.
textByHash.c9906d436cfe98f8131ff501af7e37ef528d02d6: That was delicious, nothing like the usual slop.
textByHash.ca47be22a2cc7fa59b22f91f73815cd625a456b3: Ah, so you have some fight in you.
textByHash.cadfedae8a3917a12ab6cfd6dcc130c42f57598f: Oh yes, is apparently quite good.
textByHash.cb21a630a69c167bc5f06ce657bfc857afde2137: Ah Bowley, it is good to see you again.
textByHash.cc1b35400deea7694b2a8e0f9504fe5bb6c0151d: So, what is it you wanted to show me?
textByHash.ceaedd71e3a53181c3ff6446d135f626c69729da: But don't make a yolk out of it, you may only use each tunnel once. Can't have you interrupting my workers any more than that.
textByHash.d0140b36086a5e6f335f9abdde9504f7b0e98a25: That's exactly what I wanted to hear!
textByHash.d04d25a1aa176c58d97651dddbf8e6dff309953a: I don't know if I deserve anything.
textByHash.d135e3e4462628361efb36cd0d4846ff1ec7b5f2: What do you mean? It's hardly fun without decent competition.
textByHash.d52a6b99d548f272bb400ab0c1069cf89362a6f9: Quickly! Hand out those eggs before they vanish!
textByHash.d67d6fa7f09a503cf492ce0f63af6500c67dea72: Thank you, , I really needed that.
textByHash.d83f3993236a5736b7160f14eefe0bffa8ecb9a0: The first ingredient is Dried cocoa. During any other time of year this ingredient would be eggceptionally hard to get.
textByHash.dfba08c65b80483574116632dde7a189ef9ba3fd: A fine shot, but not quite enough!
textByHash.e5c57705cda74374c16369f5007311aacd398dea: Oh. Those were the days, I haven't partaken for while now though...
textByHash.e8fea868c08e385e2cce7acfed1c8e6136439251: One more treat and I'll be ready to work on Easter again.
textByHash.ea82b3f99f6c5c385f3aee1fd8e562b3da9d0719: Ah, well I suppose I should pack it in while I'm ahead.
textByHash.ee18b27373d5fe3268a042ed98574f7308db41e2: Well, I suppose I'm not doing anything else. Why not?
textByHash.fac5a6d2f345714fda2c17ac96a733c775029852: I'll have you know this is no yolking matter.
textByHash.fffce2f4f08adbdde5dc93a92f6f7aa306e14f5a: I'm having an eggceptionally bad day. But if you must know, my Egg making machine is shell dry and the next shipment of fuel will not be here for a while!
